services.label: WordPress Operations
services.shortDescription: Productised retainer for businesses where the site genuinely matters. Server log diagnostics, database health, deliverability, security and performance — three tiers, defined response.
services.longDescription: Productised WordPress operations for businesses where the site genuinely matters — revenue depends on it, customers depend on it, or the team can't afford it falling over. Server-level log diagnostics, database health, scheduler integrity, email deliverability done properly, security hardening, performance tuning, and plugin-load auditing that most agencies don't know to look for. Three tiers — Boost, Orbit, Apogee — with monthly written reviews and defined response windows.

services.label: WordPress Plugin Development
services.shortDescription: Bespoke WordPress plugins — custom features, API integrations, admin tooling, AI extensions.
services.longDescription: Custom WordPress plugin development for teams outgrowing off-the-shelf plugins. Bespoke features, API integrations (Stripe, HubSpot, OpenAI, anything with an endpoint), Gutenberg blocks, WooCommerce extensions, AI-powered extensions, and plugin consolidation/refactoring. Performance-first, properly documented, yours to keep.

services.label: AI & Automation
services.shortDescription: AI that sounds like your brand — custom GPTs, content operations, workflow automation.
services.longDescription: AI and automation work for teams ready to deploy AI meaningfully. Custom GPTs trained on your brand voice, content operations automation, AI-powered WordPress plugins, and workflow integrations. The goal is AI that supports your team's judgement — not replaces it, and not sounds like every other AI.

services.label: Brand & Identity
services.shortDescription: Strategy, naming, visual system and voice for businesses that want to be remembered.
services.longDescription: Brand and identity work for founders, scale-ups, and established businesses ready to refresh or rebuild. Positioning, naming, visual system, tone of voice, and guidelines — produced to standard, applied across every touchpoint.

services.label: Web Development
services.shortDescription: Higher-tier websites — modern stacks, fast, accessible, built to last.
services.longDescription: Web development for teams who've outgrown template-builder sites. Modern stack (Next.js, React, headless WordPress when needed), performance-first engineering, proper accessibility, and documentation designed for the team who'll maintain it after handover.

services.label: SEO & Organic Growth
services.shortDescription: SEO as an editorial and technical discipline — not a keyword list.
services.longDescription: SEO and organic growth for teams who want meaningful compound returns from search. Technical audits, content strategy, local SEO for catchment-driven businesses, and ongoing optimisation. The work is editorial-led — we earn rankings by being useful, not by gaming algorithms.

services.label: Growth Partnership
services.shortDescription: Ongoing retained work — brand, AI, plugin dev and web, as your business evolves.
services.longDescription: A retained monthly engagement for businesses that want the full stack — brand, AI, plugin dev, and web — supporting their growth on an ongoing basis. Flexible scope, no minimum term, cancel anytime. Best for scale-ups where priorities shift faster than a fixed-scope project allows.
